_help: Post-refresh expectations for ONE (SID,client). Copy to {custom_url}\refresh_expectations_<SID>_<CLIENT>.json and fill. The skill REFUSES to audit without this (it never guesses a landscape).
expected_logsys: <SIDCLNT###  the CORRECT post-BDLS logical system for this client>
rfc_allow: <destinations that legitimately point at PRD, exact names>
user_allow: <named service/admin users allowed to stay unlocked>
